title: A Poem Upon The Death Of O.C. by Andrew Marvell — Sad Poetry Lines

title: Upon The Hill And Grove At Bill-borow by Andrew Marvell — Sad Poetry Lines
content:
To the Lord Fairfax.

See how the arched Earth does here
Rise in a perfect Hemisphere!
The stiffest Compass could not strike
A line more circular and

title: Music's Empire by Andrew Marvell — Love Poetry Lines
content:

Where jarring winds to infant Nature played.
All music was a solitary sound,

title: Upon Appleton House, to My Lord Fairfax by Andrew Marvell — Sad Poetry Lines
Tom May's Death by Andrew Marvell — Sad Poetry Lines
content:

title: The Death of Cromwell by Andrew Marvell — Sad Poetry Lines
content:

title: The Picture Of Little T.C. In A Prospect Of Flowers by Andrew Marvell — Love Poetry Lines
content:
See with what simplicity
This Nimph begins her golden daies!
In the green Grass she loves to lie,
And there with her fair Aspect tames
The Wilder flow
